headline: Conagra Brands Brings Exciting Array of Snacks, Sweet Treats to 2026 Sweets & Snacks Expo
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG), one of North America's leading branded food companies, is prepping a collection of satisfying snacks and tempting sweets for the bright lights of Las Vegas and the National Confectioners Association's 2026 Sweets & Snacks Expo. Meat snacks, sweet treats, and salty snacks comprise the company's $3.3 billion1 snacks portfolio, highlighted by several industry-leading brands. thumbnail.caption: Conagra Brands is prepping a collection of satisfying snacks and tempting sweets for the bright lights of Las Vegas and the National Confectioners Association’s 2026 Sweets & Snacks Expo. Meat snacks, sweet treats, and salty snacks comprise the company’s $3.3 billion snacks portfolio, highlighted by several industry-leading brands. New innovation at the Expo includes limited-edition Aaron Judge packs of DAVID Seeds Sweet & Spicy seeds.
